content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：雪落噬影之鎮，今日發佈囉～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！（二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：雪落噬影之鎮
冬日，女巫，孩子們，一場永不停歇的雪。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
企劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Snowfall Shadow Town》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：Snowfall Shadow Town
Winter, witches, children, and a snow that never stops.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio

感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：復甦黑日之世，今日發佈囉～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！（二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：復甦黑日之世
孩子都曾聽過：不要用肉眼直視太陽。
即便此刻，祂已經淪陷。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
企劃：B.I.A.V. Studio
致敬：J.S. Bach: Air on the G String、Niccolò Paganini: Caprice No. 24 In A Minor

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Resurrection of the World of Black Sun》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：Resurrection of the World of Black Sun 
Every child has heard it：Don't look directly at the sun.
Even at this moment, He has fallen.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
pay tribute：J.S. Bach: Air on the G String、Niccolò Paganini: Caprice No. 24 In A Minor
